queries.question: List the common services for all hotels.
queries.sql: SELECT Services.ServiceName  from Hotels_Services join Services on Hotels_Services.Service_ID = Services.ServiceID join Hotels on Hotels_Services.Hotels_ID = Hotels.HotelID   GROUP BY Hotels_Services.Service_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hotels_Services.Hotels_ID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hotels)

queries.question: At each hotel, list the corresponding services.
queries.sql: select hotels.name , services.servicename from Hotels_Services join Services on Hotels_Services.Service_ID = Services.ServiceID join Hotels on Hotels_Services.Hotels_ID = Hotels.HotelID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?servicename WHERE {
  ?hotels_services a :Hotels_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?hotels_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?hotels_services p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?hotels p:name ?name .
  ?services p:ServiceName ?servicename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the services provided by every hotel.
